description: This hardwearing footwear from homme is a shoe closet essential, referencing French class and fusing it with modern design details for the perfect semi-formal ensemble. Crafted to capture the season's hottest trends, this pair tops our wish-list!UpperLeather upper with check patterned texture details on the forefoot and midfootStitch details on the seams of the tongueA strap across the midfoot with a metal embellishment at the centreLoafer slip-on styling with a tapering toe designReinforced overlay at the heelPadded and perforated footbedUpper adhered to the outsole for maximum durabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelTextured patterns on the forefootShoe careWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
